title: Hypurr Hour - USDH Special
summary_title: USDH ticker auction: governance drama, alignment tests, and stable coin wars
summary_description: Hyperliquid's stablecoin naming vote forces major players to show their hand and choose between hyperliquid and existing businesses.

key_moments.label: USDH announcement catches everyone off guard, becomes unexpected focus
Core question emerges: is USDH just a ticker or does it confer real advantages?
Realization that USDH vote forces major teams to publicly commit to hyperliquid
80% fee reduction on stable tokens signals real ecosystem support, not just optics
Top applicants identified: native markets, paxos, agora, athena, sky, frax
Validator voting mechanics explained: 144M HLP stake, kinetic abstaining, foundation waiting
Luke explains alignment thesis: hyperliquid-first teams vs those with other businesses
